description: Vital Recorder 1.16.6 is open on the Windows desktop with the file '0002.vital' from the VitalDB open dataset already loaded. The track window shows waveform traces from a noncardiac surgery at Seoul National University Hospital. Export the loaded vital signs data to CSV format and save the file as 'case_0002_export.csv' to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\case_0002_export.csv.
